description:
Register an Apache Doris resource for use by other components.

Pairs with the generic SQL components (``sql_transform``,
``dataframe_to_table``, ``database_schema_inventory``) by exposing
its SQLAlchemy URL, and with ``dataframe_to_doris`` for Stream-Load-
based bulk ingestion via the HTTP frontend.

Example:

    ```yaml
    type: dagster_community_components.DorisResourceComponent
    attributes:
      resource_key: doris_resource
      host: doris-fe.mycompany.com
      query_port: 9030
      http_port: 8030
      database: analytics
      username: dagster_runner
      password_env_var: DORIS_PASSWORD
    ```

resource_key.description: Resource key. Other components reference it via this name.
resource_key.title: Resource Key

http_port.description: HTTP frontend port (Stream Load + admin REST).
http_port.title: Http Port

password.description: Doris password (literal). Set this OR password_env_var.
password.title: Password

ssl.description: Enable TLS for query + HTTP endpoints (Doris 2.0+).
ssl.title: Ssl

title: DorisResourceComponent
